content:
<!-- type: changes lang: yaml -->

```yaml
changes:
  - file: .score/tech_design/crates/sdd/logic/issue-centric-workflow.md
    action: modify
    description: |
      1. Clarify init_change pseudocode: annotate change_dir as relative to project_root (main repo)
      2. Add Storage Model section documenting control plane vs data plane split
      3. Add note that init_change execution order (change_dir before worktree) is correct by design
    details: |
      Section: Changes > init_change.rs entry (currently lines 441-447)
      Change: Annotate the line `let change_dir = format!(".score/changes/{}/", slug);`
      with a comment: `// relative to project_root (main repo), NOT worktree_path`

      New section to add (Storage Model):
        | Plane         | Root                | Contents                                                                       |
        |---------------|---------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
        | Control plane | project_root (main) | .score/issues/, .score/changes/<id>/ (STATE.yaml, specs, prompts, payloads, implementation.md) |
        | Data plane    | worktree_path       | crates/, projects/, .score/tech_design/ (code + TD spec edits)                |

      Note to add near init_change pseudocode:
        `change_dir` is created before `git_worktree_add` because the change directory
        belongs on the main repo (control plane). This ordering is intentional.
```
